problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene — specifically Viral vector delivery — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
